messages.text: @Roberto Leal I need you on this immediately. Meridian Technologies has been waiting over a week for the updated enterprise pricing proposal. Their procurement lead emailed me directly this morning — they have a board approval deadline on Friday and we are at serious risk of losing this deal. This is a $250K ARR contract.

Please send them the updated Enterprise tier pricing with the custom rate we discussed ($22/seat/month for 120 seats) and include **Net 60 payment terms** instead of our standard Net 30. We agreed to this in the planning call two weeks ago.
Also make sure the proposal references the dedicated onboarding timeline — 4 weeks with engineering support included. Do this by EOD today. Their contact is Lisa Park, lisa.park@meridiantech.com.
On it. I'll have the proposal out by 3 PM. Sorry for the delay — I missed the follow-up reminder.
Please loop me in on the email when you send it. And log everything in Salesforce — this is a top-priority deal for Q2.
